noVoiceChannel.title: You must be in a voice channel to play music.

noTrackFound.title: No track found

noTrackUrl.title: No url found for the current track

quizNoVoiceChannel.title: Error
quizNoVoiceChannel.description: You must be in a voice channel to start the quiz.

rateLimit.title: Rate Limited
rateLimit.description: You are being rate limited by Discord. Please try again in {{waitTime}} seconds.

spamCooldown.title: Spam Detected
spamCooldown.description: You are sending commands too quickly! Please wait {{waitTime}} seconds before trying again.

duplicateTrack.title: Track already in queue
duplicateTrack.description: That track is already playing or queued.

playlistNotFound.title: Playlist not found
playlistNotFound.description: No playlist with the name **{{playlistName}}** was found.

playlistEmpty.title: Playlist is empty
playlistEmpty.description: No tracks found in the playlist **{{playlistName}}**.

duplicatePlaylist.title: Playlist already exists
duplicatePlaylist.description: A playlist with the name **{{playlistName}}** already exists.

error.extractStream: Could not extract stream, skipping track...

legendary.title: {{emoji}} *Legendary Find!*

small.title: {{emoji}} *Small Treasure*

message.title: Added successfully

createModal.title: Create Playlist
createModal.tracksPlaceholder: Enter track urls, one per line

successEmbed.title: Playlist created
successEmbed.descriptionWithTracks: {{user}} created a playlist with {{count}} tracks called **{{name}}**

infoEmbed.title: Playlist created - Info
infoEmbed.description:
You just created a playlist called **{{name}}**

However, the following URLs are invalid or unsupported:
{{invalidUrls}}

Only single track URLs are supported.
infoEmbed.footer: You can add more tracks later using the `/playlist update` command.

updateModal.title: Update Playlist: {{name}}
updateModal.tracksPlaceholder: Enter track urls, one per line

infoEmbed.title: Playlist updated - Info
infoEmbed.description:
You updated the playlist **{{name}}**

However, the following URLs are invalid or unsupported and were skipped:
{{invalidUrls}}

Only single track URLs are supported.

deleteModal.title: Delete Playlist: {{name}}
deleteModal.infoLabel:
You are about to delete the playlist __{{name}}__
It contains {{count}} tracks.

mismatchErrorEmbed.title: Error deleting playlist
mismatchErrorEmbed.description: Failed to delete playlist. The name you entered did not match the playlist name.
